hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=claude-code" --data-urlencode "session_id=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" --data-urlencode "cwd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')" --data-urlencode "event=start" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=claude-code" --data-urlencode "session_id=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" --data-urlencode "cwd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')" --data-urlencode "event=thinking" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=claude-code" --data-urlencode "session_id=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" --data-urlencode "cwd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')" --data-urlencode "event=tool_use" --data-urlencode "tool_name=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // empty')" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=claude-code" --data-urlencode "session_id=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" --data-urlencode "cwd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')" --data-urlencode "event=thinking" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=claude-code" --data-urlencode "session_id=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" --data-urlencode "cwd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')" --data-urlencode "event=stop" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=claude-code" --data-urlencode "session_id=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" --data-urlencode "cwd=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')" --data-urlencode "event=exit" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null || true
